mapper.select: select cl.id, cl.student_count, cs.class_id, cl.class_name, co.course_name, co.course_type, cl.create_time, cl.update_time from class_student as cs left join class as cl on cs.class_id = cl.id left join course as co on cl.course_id = co.id where cs.student_id = #{studentId}

select cl.*, t.username, co.course_name, co.course_type from class as cl left join course as co on cl.course_id = co.id left join teacher as t on cl.teacher_id = t.id where cl.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
and (cl.class_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
